def parse_user_response(data: dict) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": data["id"],
        "name": data["name"],
        "email": data["email"],
        "role": data.get("role", "user"),
    }


def calculate_discount(price: float, user_type: str) -> float:
    discounts = {"premium": 0.8, "vip": 0.7}
    factor = discounts.get(user_type, 1.0)
    return price * factor


def load_user_preferences(user_id: int) -> dict:
    defaults = {"theme": "light", "language": "en", "notifications": True}
    try:
        raw = fetch_from_db(user_id)
        return {
            "theme": raw["settings"]["theme"],
            "language": raw["settings"]["language"],
            "notifications": raw["settings"]["notifications"],
        }
    except (KeyError, TypeError) as e:
        logger.warning(f"Failed to load preferences for {user_id}: {e}")
        return defaults
